title.en: The Lord of Eternal Zero recognizes it.

content.en:
"This is the breath of a genius on the other side!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero recognizes it.

Whoa!!

They came to Ye Tian's cave mansion and did not go in.

"Whose cave is this?"

A deputy mountain lord asked.

Then.

The Lord of Xunshan came out and said, "Fellow Mountain Lords, this is the Cave Mansion of the Sixth-Order Envoy Endless Lord!"

At this time.

The Lord of Xunshan was also confused.

He knew that the Lord of Endless had comprehended a lot of the Golden Texts on the other side, and he had asked him about the Golden Texts on the other side before.

But he never expected that this was only a short period of time, and the Endless Lord would become a genius on the other side!

This is just too wicked!

"Lord of Endless!"

These deputy mountain lords wrote it down.

They didn't continue to wait here, and were going to wait for Ye Tian to come back after he came out.

Thereupon.

One by one, they left.

......

Ye Tian was in the midst of the transformation of a genius at the other side at the moment, so it would take some time to complete the transformation.

Time flies, about a tenth of the time of the Archean era has passed.

this day.

Ye Tiancai truly completed the transformation.

"The flesh is many times stronger!"

Ye Tian felt the horror of this physical body.

At this time.

The increase in strength on the other side of the golden body is not so large, but if it is the overall golden body of the other side, it can still greatly improve the strength.

"It's no wonder that the Lord of the True Extremes didn't go all out to create the method of the golden body on the other side, mainly because the price paid did not match the gain. The other party is already a genius on the other side, if he is severely injured because of the method of creating the golden body on the other side, it will not be worth it!"

Ye Tian thought so.

At this time.

He tried to use the magic of the other side, turning into a little golden light and poking himself.

His extremely strong body was easily pierced by this golden mang.

However, he withdrew in time and did not suffer any injuries.

"What a terrifying other side of the magic technique, the other side of the magic power I created, is just an ordinary other side of the magic spell, it has such a terrifying attack effect. If I create more supernatural powers on the other side, my strength will continue to increase and skyrocket!" Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He gave this other side of the magic art a name - the other side of the golden mang!

Soon.

And he was out.

Then.

The lord of Xunshan waited for the lord to come.

Then, the Lord of Eternal Zero, the deputy mountain masters, also came.

"I've seen the Lord of Eternal Zero!"

"I've seen the Lord of Tengshan!"

"I've seen the Lord of the Cold Mountain!"

"I've seen the Lord of the Moon Feather!"

Ye Tian greeted the four deputy mountain masters.

"Endless Lord, you have become a genius on the other side!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He wanted to hide it, but he couldn't hide it, so he just admitted it.

"Good!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero: They were excited.

I didn't expect Gu Heng Mountain to give birth to another Shore-level genius, and now they Gu Heng Mountain has two Shore-level geniuses, which is a great thing!

Then.

The Lord of Eternal Zero directly announced: "Lord of Endless, from today onwards, you will be the first-level Lord of Gu Heng Mountain!"

Lord!

This is the position of Gu Heng Mountain, second only to the deputy mountain master, the other lords are almost all primordial-level geniuses of the ninth bone transformation realm, and only a few venerable lords are only primeval-level geniuses of the eight-stage bone transformation realm.

But Ye Tian, now he is only five times in the Bone Transformation Realm, even if he becomes a genius in the other side, he is only a top primordial level genius comparable to the sixth Bone Transformation Realm, and there is a big gap in strength from the weakest Lord of Gu Heng Mountain.

But.

He is a genius of the other side, and this alone is not comparable to other lords.

Therefore, none of the other lords had any opinions, nor did they dare to have them.

That's it.

Ye Tian became a lord of Gu Heng Mountain, and his status soared instantly.

The point is.

After becoming the lord of Gu Heng Mountain, he is qualified to comprehend other golden texts on the other side.

Coupled with the Golden Text on the other side of the True Beast Alliance, he now has more Golden Texts on the other side.

......

Guheng Mountain.

Another void on the other side.

There are more golden texts on the other side here, and only the Lord is qualified to enter here to attain enlightenment.

Previously, Ye Tian was not qualified, but now he is also qualified.

In addition to the Golden Text on the Other Side, there are some Haven on the Other Side.

Ye Tian can all be enlightened, but he still needs to contribute points.

Gu Heng Mountain naturally will not give the Venerable Lords enlightenment for free.

However, the Venerable Lords have a lot of contribution points, so there is no shortage of contribution points needed to comprehend the Golden Inscription on the other side.

It's just that the more Jinwen on the other side of the enlightenment, the more difficult it is for most of the lords to enter the enlightenment.

Like Ye Tian, it is easy to comprehend one after another Jin Wen's bone transformation realm, which is still very rare and rare.

While comprehending the golden text on the other side, Ye Tian did not forget to refine his immeasurable bones.

However, the resources that used to be of great use to him were now very average after continuing to refine.

This is because his physical foundation is so terrifying that the same resources are useless.

"We have to collect enough Source Stones from the other side!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Ordinary bone transformation realms can't use the source stone of the other side, and only a genius of the other side level will use the source stone of the other side to refine their immeasurable bones.

This is because the other side level genius has the power of the other side origin in his body, so he can use the power of the other side of the origin to refine the other side of the source stone, extract the energy in it for his own use, so as to complete the bone transformation of his immeasurable bones.

It was precisely because the ordinary Bone Transformation Realm did not need the Beyond Source Stone, so even if it obtained the Peer Origin Stone, it would be traded out and sold to a top force like Gu Heng Mountain.

And Gu Hengshan has been acquiring the source stone on the other side, so there are certain reserves.

But if you want to get the source stone on the other side, you have to exchange it with contribution points, which is the rule of Gu Heng Mountain, and no one can make an exception.

It hadn't been long since Ye Tiancai became the Venerable Lord, so he didn't have much contribution points accumulated.

Therefore, he only exchanged thirty source stones from the other side to try the effect.

......

"Let's try a piece of the other side of the source stone first!"

Ye Tian held this piece of the source stone of the other side, and then mobilized the power of the origin of the other side in his body and began to extract the energy of the source stone of the other side, pouring into his body, refining a certain immeasurable bone.

With the passage of time, this immeasurable bone gradually completed six bone transformations.

"It's successful, I didn't expect to successfully complete six bone transformations with just one source stone!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

No wonder they all want to become a genius on the other side, although they are of no use for other resources to become a genius on the other side, but the source stone on the other side can quickly refine the immeasurable bone, and the cultivation and improvement speed will be faster!
